boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase cannot proceed. Source records indicate that REL-AST-081 shows active cabinet/handler controls are still pending. STD-AST-081-P mandates that a full hazard-control status match must be confirmed before PO execution. The abstract-field trap remains unresolved, necessitating escalation.
